question_text: Which of the following is a practical use of an electromagnet in everyday life?

options.label: A
options.text: In a doorbell to create a ringing sound when someone presses the button

options.label: B
options.text: To separate salt from seawater in desalination plants

options.label: C
options.text: To cool food in a refrigerator

options.label: D
options.text: To heat water in a kettle

explanation: Electromagnets are used in doorbells because when the button is pressed, current flows through the coil, creating a magnetic field that attracts a metal striker to hit a bell or chime. The other options use different types of technology.
